violations.description: Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — ---Ansul pull on new fryer does not have inspection pull tag.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Small chemical cabinet below dish dryer racks.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Pork chops in walk in cooler found at 46F. *Directed to ice meats and turn down unit. If dial turn down does not correct temperature, unit may need to be serviced.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Marinara and hot dogs are not marked with open date.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Black debris at interior side walls of ice machine. -Ice well hole access points have exposed foam.
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
